name: Landing page loads with parallax and navigation

planSteps.description: The hero heading 'Protect Wildlife. Track Everything.' is visible
The navigation bar shows 'Species', 'Sightings', 'Dashboard', and 'Report Sighting'
Click the 'Species' link in the navigation bar
Scroll down to the habitats section
The 'Three Habitats. One Mission.' heading is visible
The 'Recent Sightings' section shows Sumatran Tiger, Blue Whale, and Snow Leopard
The 'Every Sighting Counts' CTA section is visible
